name: borrower-non-spousal-joint
rationale: Two unrelated co-applicants on refi (e.g., siblings, business partners, investor + occupant). Distinct from spousal joint in: tax filing separately, separate NOAs, distinct credit profiles, separate liabilities, potentially separate property-share allocation. Layer 3: does canonical_map / underwriting treat non-spousal joint identically to spousal joint, or are there distinct aggregation rules (separate income, combined LTV, etc.)? LIKELY FRANCO-INPUT-REQUIRED: aggregation policy intersects with broker-workflow expectations.
notes: Single-event sequence. Layer 3 item; co-applicants are siblings (David Okafor + Jennifer Tran assumed sibling-like — fictional).
